# Héading with àccénts & ümlauts

This paragraph has **bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~, and `inline code`.

## Emoji Section 🚀🎯✅

Here are some emoji in body text: 🔥 This is fire! 💡 Great idea! ⚠️ Warning!

### Angle Brackets <div> and HTML

This has angle brackets: `<div>`, `<span>`, and raw HTML: <strong>bold via HTML</strong>.

What about `<script>alert('xss')</script>` in inline code?

## Curly Braces {} and Special Markdown

JSON example: `{"key": "value", "nested": {"a": 1}}`

Pipes in text: this | has | pipes | but is not a table.

## Backticks in `Heading` Text

This heading contains backticks.

### Math-like: O(n²) × √2 ÷ π ≈ 3.14

Unicode math symbols in a heading.

## Table with Special Characters

| Symbol | Name | Usage |
|--------|------|-------|
| `<` | Less than | Comparisons |
| `>` | Greater than | Redirects |
| `&` | Ampersand | URL params |
| `"` | Quote | Strings |
| `{` `}` | Braces | Objects |
